llm_eval.notes: Compiles; stdlib only, clear render()/needs_os_preamble()/main() split, JSONDecodeError handled, missing-file and bad-arg paths return distinct exit codes (1/2), no network, write only to explicit --output path. Has script frontmatter. Minor: scalar frontmatter values written unquoted/unescaped so a description containing ':' or newline could emit invalid YAML.
